message:
test(conformance): add strlen_strict and memcpy_strict fixture tests

Adds fixture tests for basic string operations:
- strlen_strict: empty, hello, single_char test cases
- memcpy_strict: full/partial/zero/single-byte copy cases

Test count: 103 -> 105

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
